01 — About Me

Background & Identity

"Great design lives at the intersection of empathy, data, and craft."

I'm Jenitta M, a final-year B.E. Computer Science student at SCAD College of Engineering and Technology, Tirunelveli. My core interest lies at the junction of UI/UX Design and Data Science — two fields that together let me build products that look right and think right.

Across four internships I've worked on mobile apps, data pipelines, responsive websites, and end-to-end product interfaces. Outside of tech, I'm a district-level Taekwondo player and a pencil sketch artist — discipline and visual intuition are things I've trained in, not just tools I use.
